data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Compensation for bumped customers', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for compensation, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that the system has implemented or is capable of providing compensation to bumped customers. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of compensation mechanisms for bumped customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for compensation mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system compensates bumped customers as required.
